name: Oathbreaker Spells
description:
You gain oathbreaker spells at the paladin levels listed.

Oathbreaker Spells:
- Paladin Level 3rd: hellish rebuke, inflict wounds
- Paladin Level 5th: crown of madness, darkness
- Paladin Level 9th: animate dead, bestow curse
- Paladin Level 13th: blight, confusion
- Paladin Level 17th: contagion, dominate person
